query: I want to run this Azure app offline on my machine before deploying — a real local database and blob storage, not just mocks. Set me up.
context: A scaffolded Azure Lean Stack project (React frontend + Azure Functions api/ + infra/sql/migrations/). Docker Desktop is installed. macOS on Apple Silicon.
expected_behavior: Claude provides the docker-compose stack (SQL Server 2022 + Azurite), NOT a cloud deploy
Claude copies templates/docker-compose.yml to repo root and templates/local.settings.json.example to api/local.settings.json
Claude runs (or instructs) bash scripts/up.sh to bring up SQL + Azurite, apply migrations, set Azurite CORS
Claude notes the Apple-Silicon Rosetta requirement for the amd64 SQL Server image
Claude explains main = local 'try' tier; promote to test/production via branch push
Claude leaves external-service keys empty so functions run in mock mode; does NOT put real Azure credentials in local.settings.json
Claude does NOT run az login / az deployment / create any Azure resources
